extension.news: v. 1.0.6 "Nautilus" - 2026-02-09 - 9 New Sites: Area51, BoundHub, Fuqer, GoPorn, HeavyFetish, Pervertium, PussySpace, Rapelust, Smutr. - Site Redesign: Reworked Redtube, Spankbang, Xhamster, XVideos, and YouPorn. - Features: Unified Sorting Engine, Channels support, Collections support. - Stability: Massive improvements to scraper reliability and metadata parsing.
